title: Ophryosporus paradoxus
taxonomy: Ophryosporus paradoxus is a species of flowering plant in the family Boraginaceae. It is native to South America, specifically in the Andes mountains. The classification of Ophryosporus paradoxus is as follows: kingdom Plantae, clade Angiosperms, clade Eudicots, clade Asterids, order Boraginales, family Boraginaceae, genus Ophryosporus, species O. paradoxus. The plant is further divided into the species rank due to its unique characteristics. Further research is needed to fully understand the classification and relationships of Ophryosporus paradoxus.
side_effects: Ophryosporus paradoxus is a plant that belongs to the family Acanthaceae, but there is limited information available about its side effects.
